profile_law: Use the lightest sufficient profile; do not over-govern simple surfaces or under-govern runtime and evidence surfaces.

full.purpose: Load-bearing runtime, evidence, validation, or governance surface.

compact.purpose: Important support, report, configuration, or documentation surface.

pointer.purpose: Root, generated, or low-risk navigation pointer.

claim_boundary: Mini READMEs improve repository orientation only; they do not prove correctness or grant authority.
